items.name: cesium-vectortile-gl-plus
items.description: **cesium-vectortile-gl-plus** 是专为 **CesiumJS** 设计的开源矢量瓦片渲染库。原生 Primitive 实现，**不依赖 ImageryProvider 和 第三方矢量瓦片渲染器**， 支持 MLT/MVT/PBF 与 GeoJSON，兼容 MapLibre 样式规范，可渲染点/线/面/文字注记，支持虚线、贴地、合批优化与 GPU 剔除。

items.name: FPS-Drop-Fix-PowerShell
items.description: Install FPS Drop Fix via PowerShell — one-command gaming optimizer for Windows 10/11. Fix stuttering, FPS drops, input lag. Valorant, Fortnite, CS2, Apex, Rust.

items.name: DLL-Repair-Tool
items.description: Fix "MSVCP140.dll is missing" and "VCRUNTIME140.dll not found" errors on Windows 10/11. Repair d3dx9_43.dll, xinput1_3.dll and 50+ missing DLL files in one click. Installs all Visual C++ Redistributable packages, DirectX Runtime and .NET Framework automatically.

items.name: Memory-Leak-Fixer
items.description: Fix high RAM usage and memory leaks on Windows 10/11 -- detect leaking processes, clear standby memory, fix Desktop Window Manager memory leak (dwm.exe), resolve "Your computer is low on memory" error. Fix PC getting slower over time.

items.name: Microphone-Fix-Tool
items.description: Fix microphone not working on Windows 10/11 -- mic not detected, too quiet, not working in Zoom Teams Discord. Fix privacy settings blocking mic, microphone boost missing, audio input after Windows Update. USB, Bluetooth, built-in.

items.name: Disk-Usage-100-Fix
items.description: Fix 100% disk usage on Windows 10/11 -- Task Manager shows disk at 100 for no reason. Disable SysMain Superfetch, stop Windows Search indexing, fix AHCI driver, optimize page file. Fix slow PC, disk usage stuck at 100, hard drive constantly running. SSD and HDD.

items.name: cf-recommend
items.description: Codeforces CLI tool

items.name: Black-Screen-Fix
items.description: Fix black screen on Windows 10/11 — after login, Windows Update, driver update, black screen with cursor, no display, GPU timeout. Safe Mode compatible repair tool.

items.name: Screen-Flickering-Fix
items.description: Fix screen flickering and "display driver stopped responding" on Windows 10/11. Repair monitor flashing, screen tearing, VIDEO_TDR_FAILURE, black screen flashes. Fix display driver crashes for NVIDIA, AMD, Intel. Screen flashing on and off fix.

items.name: Headphone-Fix-Tool
items.description: Fix headphones not working on Windows 10/11 -- no sound in headphones, headset not detected, AirPods no audio, USB headset not recognized, Bluetooth headphones connected but no sound. Fix Realtek jack detection, gaming headset mic, audio crackling and one side not working.

items.name: Black-Screen-Fix-PowerShell
items.description: Install Black Screen Fix via PowerShell — repair black screen after login, update or driver crash on Windows 10/11. Works in Safe Mode, GPU rollback included.

items.name: BSOD-Repair-Tool
items.description: Fix Blue Screen of Death (BSOD) on Windows 10/11 -- repair IRQL_NOT_LESS_OR_EQUAL, CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED, VIDEO_TDR_FAILURE (nvlddmkm.sys) and all stop codes. Blue screen fix tool with SFC, DISM, crash dump analysis and driver repair.

items.name: Audio-Driver-Fixer
items.description: Fix no sound and "No Audio Output Device is installed" on Windows 10/11. Repair Realtek HD Audio driver, fix audio not working after Windows Update, crackling sound, microphone not working. Supports Realtek, NVIDIA, AMD, Intel.

items.name: FPS-Drop-Fix
items.description: Fix FPS drops, stuttering and micro-freezes on Windows 10/11. Optimize timer resolution, power plan, GPU scheduling, Game DVR off, standby RAM clear. Valorant, Fortnite, CS2, Rust.

items.name: WiFi-Disconnect-Fix
items.description: Fix WiFi keeps disconnecting on Windows 10/11 -- WiFi drops every few minutes, "Connected but No Internet" error, WiFi not reconnecting after sleep, adapter power management. Fix WiFi limited access, slow WiFi, WiFi drops on laptop. Intel, Realtek, Qualcomm.

items.name: Printer-Fix-Tool-PowerShell
items.description: Install Printer Fix Tool via PowerShell — fix printer offline, stuck queue and Print Spooler errors on Windows 10/11. HP, Canon, Epson, Brother supported.

items.name: USB-Repair-Tool
items.description: Fix "USB Device Not Recognized" and "Device Descriptor Request Failed" on Windows 10/11. Repair USB drive not showing up, fix "You need to format the disk", Unknown USB Device error. Reset USB host controllers for flash drives and external hard drives.

items.name: Windows-System-Repair
items.description: All-in-one Windows repair — fix MSVCP140.dll, VCRUNTIME140.dll missing, BSOD, corrupted system files, DirectX errors. SFC /scannow, DISM, VC++ and .NET installer.

items.name: Dual-Monitor-Fix-PowerShell
items.description: Install Dual Monitor Fix via PowerShell — repair second monitor not detected, wrong resolution and extended display issues on Windows 10/11.

items.name: Runtime-Installer-AIO
items.description: Visual C++ Redistributable All-in-One installer (2005-2022) with DirectX End-User Runtime, .NET Framework 4.8.1 and Universal CRT. Fix "MSVCP140.dll is missing", VCRUNTIME140.dll, d3dx9_43.dll and all missing DLL errors on Windows 10/11.

items.name: DirectX-Repair-Kit-PowerShell
items.description: Install DirectX Repair Kit via PowerShell — fix missing d3dx9_43.dll, xinput1_3.dll and DirectX 9/10/11 runtime errors on Windows 10/11 games.

items.name: Dual-Monitor-Fix
items.description: Fix dual monitor problems on Windows 10/11 — second monitor not detected, wrong resolution, display flickering, monitor goes to sleep, extended mode broken. NVIDIA and AMD.

items.name: Slow-Boot-Fix
items.description: Fix slow boot and slow startup on Windows 10/11 -- reduce boot time from minutes to seconds. Disable unnecessary startup programs, fix Windows Fast Startup issues, repair boot configuration. Fix PC taking too long to start, black screen on startup, long loading screen.

items.name: Windows-System-Repair-PowerShell
items.description: Install Windows System Repair via PowerShell — fix DLL errors, DirectX, BSOD and corrupted files on Windows 10/11. SFC, DISM, VC++ redistributables included.

items.name: Bluetooth-Repair-Tool
items.description: Fix Bluetooth not working on Windows 10/11 -- repair pairing failures, Bluetooth toggle missing, device not connecting, headphones connected but no audio, Bluetooth disappeared after Windows Update. Intel, Realtek, Qualcomm, USB adapters.

items.name: HDMI-Audio-Fix-PowerShell
items.description: Install HDMI Audio Fix via PowerShell — restore HDMI and DisplayPort audio on Windows 10/11 when TV or monitor has no sound, NVIDIA/AMD HD Audio missing.

items.name: MGDefender
items.description: Artifact implementation of scan-cycle-aware PLC protection with embedded virtualization and lightweight I/O anomaly detection.

items.name: meta-doctor
items.description: Most monitoring tells you something broke. A doctor opens the pull request that fixes it.
